title: SNES Collection (example)
author: LibretroWebXR
_comment: Example of the collection schema (vs the legacy manifest). Core and box-art are omitted on purpose — the loader fills core from the system's default and resolves box art from libretro-thumbnails. ROMs are user-supplied; these point at files you'd drop in roms/ (none ship here). Demonstrates ?collection=roms/snes-demo.collection.json.

games.title: Legend of Zelda, The - A Link to the Past (USA)
